title: Delicious Algerian Fish Tagine
description: A flavorful fish dish from Algeria, made with a rich and spicy tagine sauce. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the fish fillets and cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Algerian tagine spice blend, crispy peppercorns, and salt. Stir to combine.
Add enough water to the saucepan to cover the fish. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook, covered, for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy peppercorns and a side of couscous or rice.
